title: helianthemum croceum var. stenophyllum
intro: Helianthemum croceum var. stenophyllum, also known as a type of rockrose or sunrose, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of the western United States and Mexico. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its essential oil and flavonoid content. The health benefits of Helianthemum croceum var. stenophyllum include its potential to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which are popular herbal preparations used to harness its medicinal properties.
